lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I kill the dragons up here?

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: I suppose that's okay since you've got a Slayer assignment. But when you've finished it, leave the rest for me!

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: Don't even think about it - these dragons up here are for me!

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: There's a Slayer Master in my family, so I don't stop people doing their Slayer assignments, but otherwise these dragons are for me, not you.

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: Dragon-slaying, of course. Do I look like one of those serfs who wanders around scavenging scales off the floor? I'm just having a rest now, before I get back to the fight.

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: My cousin Slieve built the access routes through this blue dragon lair. But she's only really interested in black dragons, not blue ones, so she said I could have this area for myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you dressed like that?

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: It's hot in here with all the dragonfire.

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: I've got wizard boots on, see? What more would I want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, maybe you'd want something to help you fight the dragons? Wizard boots don't sound very useful.

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: They're useful enough for what I'm doing. Anyway, moving on...

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Eve
lines.text: Oi, find yourself some other dragons - these are mine!
